runtime_guardrails.current_java_blocker: Unqualified java -version is unavailable, but builder/orchestrator recorded explicit Homebrew JDK 21.0.11 proof with JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home and used it for Maven/root verification.
